sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9028" key="a)ni/lastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνίλαστος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n9028.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unappeased, merciless,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.170c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
